sections.paragraph:
Original: רזון

Transliteration: rezôn

Phonetic: rez-one'

BDB Definition:

Rezon = "prince"
  1. son of Eliadah, a Syrian, who lead a band of freebooters and established a petty kingdom at Damascus in the time of David and Solomon

Origin: from H7336

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
